title: Anything to address for custom domains?
excerpt: Hi. I have just stumbled upon a possibility for organizations to claim domain in Enterprise plans. Is there anything special to consider when building app integrations and board views, considering the accounts with custo…

posts.author: igsmr (Igor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. I have just stumbled upon a possibility for organizations to claim domain in Enterprise plans. Is there anything special to consider when building app integrations and board views, considering the accounts with custom domain may want to use it. For example, I use monday’s infrastructure to host backend and frontend apps, which operate under the monday’s domain.
Thanks.
